subject: Bea, the Stow-on-Side Gym Leader of Galar, kneeling in a fighting-ready posture inside a stadium arena with crowd and gym signage visible behind her
description: A character labeled 'Bea' on the trainer card frame is shown in a low kneeling pose, one knee down, body angled toward the viewer with weight settled into the stance. The figure wears a sleeveless dark athletic top with a high collar, fingerless combat gloves, and orange-accented athletic bottoms with a black belt-style waistband. A short silver-grey hair-crop sits above a focused, neutral expression. The setting is unmistakably a sports arena: stadium seating filled with a crowd recedes behind the figure, a large white-and-red signage banner ('SAGATAC' style lettering) hangs over the arena entrance, and the architecture suggests an indoor gym stadium with structured ceiling beams. The lower portion of the card carries the trainer Supporter text-box. Lighting is even and ambient, hall-lit rather than dramatic.
foreground: kneeling athlete-figure in fighting attire, hands ready, one knee planted
background: stadium arena interior with crowd seating, overhead signage banner, structural beams
emotion: focused, composed, ready stance — competitive calm
